probes.name: organization-default-invariant
probes.description: Every non-erased tenant has EXACTLY ONE is_default=true Organization. Zero → structural bug (tenant provisioned without seeder). Two-plus → the auto-demote path failed. Either state trips the probe critical, which page ops.
probes.reference: The ReconcileDefaultOrganizationInvariantJob repairs drift nightly; this probe catches drift within the day.

probes.name: organization-tree-path-consistency
probes.description: For every row: tree_path decomposed on the separator produces (a) a chain of live Organization ids (b) ending in self (c) whose parent chain matches parent_id. Cheap because sampled — probes 1% of rows per run.

probes.name: organization-orphan-parent
probes.description: Zero Organization rows carry a parent_id pointing at a non-existent (or soft-deleted) row. The FK is ON DELETE SET NULL so orphans should be impossible; this probe catches out-of-band manipulation.

probes.name: organization-cross-tenant-parent
probes.description: Zero Organization rows carry parent_id.tenant_id != tenant_id. Enforced at write time by the observer + rule; this probe catches manual DB corruption + confirms tenant isolation.

probes.name: organization-slot-consistency
probes.description: For every tenant: the number of active + paused Organizations matches the consumed `organization_slot` entitlement counter. Drift indicates an entitlement observer bug.

probes.name: organization-cache-reachable
probes.description: Redis namespace reachable for the org:* keys. Falls back to DB on failure.

probes.name: organization-rebuild-tree-paths-job-stuck
probes.description: No RebuildTreePathsJob is running (state=working) for > 5 minutes. A hung job blocks the moved subtree's tree_path from being consistent — descendant-lookup queries would return stale results.
